title: Ec2SsmCycle executor
description: Starts EC2 instances, executes an SSM document, and optionally stops instances when done.

region.description: AWS region where EC2 and SSM commands are executed.

timeoutMs.description: Maximum wait time for SSM command execution completion.

pollIntervalMs.description: Polling interval while waiting for SSM command completion.

startWaitTimeoutMs.description: Maximum wait time for instances to become running.

stopWaitTimeoutMs.description: Maximum wait time for instances to become stopped.

stopAfterCompletion.description: Stop instances after command completes or fails.

stopOnlyIfStarted.description: When true, only stop instances that this executor started.
